summary: This Excel spreadsheet contains a detailed GDPR compliance checklist tracking the status of regulatory requirements such as Data Processing Agreements and Security Measures. It lists specific third-party vendors like OpenAI and Google Cloud Platform alongside technical security standards like AES-256 encryption and ISO 27001 compliance. The document serves as an internal tracker for legal documentation and data protection activities relevant to the startup's operations.

sniff_test_notes: Confirms use of specific AI and cloud vendors (OpenAI, Twilio) for the phone agent infrastructure; indicates high maturity in compliance tracking with many items marked Done.
